top_signals.title: U.S. Treasury sell-off eases, traders eye highest 30-year yield since 1999
top_signals.summary: Global bond markets remain on edge as traders monitor central banks' responses to renewed inflation fears.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: ‘The Madison’ and Tossing Maritime under the Bus
top_signals.summary: I watched the first episode of The Madison, a Michelle Pfeiffer TV Drama on Paramount.In short, it deals with a rich NY family, where the patriarch dies while fishing in Montana and the daughter of the matriarch played, by Michelle Pfeiffer, gets mugged in New York City.
